recommended.name: Cotton
recommended.reason: Lightweight, highly breathable, absorbs sweat, and allows air circulation to cool the skin.

recommended.name: Linen
recommended.reason: Loosely woven, allows heat to escape from the body, and dries very quickly.

recommended.name: Chambray
recommended.reason: A lightweight alternative to denim that provides breathability and durability.

avoid.name: Polyester / Nylon
avoid.reason: Synthetic fabrics trap heat and moisture, leading to increased body temperature and skin irritation.

avoid.name: Denim
avoid.reason: Heavy and tight-weave fabric that restricts airflow and traps heat.

avoid.name: Silk
avoid.reason: Can trap heat and is prone to damage from sweat and sunscreen.

styling.fit: Loose-fitting clothing to allow air circulation and evaporation of sweat.
styling.color: Light colors (white, beige, pastels) that reflect solar radiation, rather than dark colors (black, navy, dark brown) that absorb it.
styling.layers: Minimize layers. If layering is required for sun protection, use extremely thin, loose-fitting cotton.

headwear.spec: At least 3-inch brim to shade eyes, face, ears, and neck.
For basic sun protection, preferably with ventilation holes.
Preferably UV-blocking or light-colored to create personal shade.

eyewear.spec: Wrap-around style or lenses offering 99% to 100% UVA and UVB protection.

skin_protection.spec: Broad-spectrum SPF 30 or higher, applied 20 minutes before going outdoors and reapplied every 2 hours.
